message.content:
@startuml
participant "ListingController" as LC
participant "FixPriceListingMapper" as FPLM
participant "Database" as DB
participant "allListings: ArrayList<FixPriceListing>" as AL

LC -> LC : doGet()
activate LC

LC -> FPLM : readList()
activate FPLM

FPLM -> DB : SELECT * FROM fixed_price_listing
activate DB

DB --> FPLM : resultSet
deactivate DB

FPLM --> AL : create(title=resultSet.getString("title"), ...)

FPLM --> LC : allListings
deactivate FPLM

deactivate LC
@enduml
